requirements.desc: R1: flow finalize writes state.finalizedAt (ISO 8601 UTC)
requirements.note: run-finalize now calls saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString()) in commit step, and saveFinalizedAt enforces UTC ISO format with Z suffix.

requirements.desc: R2: metrics token uses state.finalizedAt as date axis
requirements.note: metrics token removed mtime-based date derivation and now builds row dates from parsed.state.finalizedAt.

requirements.desc: R3: specs missing state.finalizedAt are skipped with warning
requirements.note: buildRows emits a warning to stderr and continues (skips) when state.finalizedAt is missing/invalid.

requirements.desc: R4: metrics cache validity uses maxFinalizedAt
requirements.note: current maxFinalizedAt is computed from flow entries and compared with cached maxFinalizedAt in isCacheFresh.

requirements.desc: R5: cache missing maxFinalizedAt is invalidated
requirements.note: isCacheFresh returns false when parsed.maxFinalizedAt is absent or not a string, forcing recomputation.

requirements.desc: R6: backfill runs once during this spec finalize
requirements.note: finalize hook runs spec-local finalize-migration.js, and the script uses a persistent .backfill-done marker to prevent re-execution after first successful run.

requirements.desc: R7: backfill source is merge date with spec first-added fallback
requirements.note: migration script resolves merge timestamp via first-parent main log, then falls back to first-added timestamp via diff-filter=A.

requirements.desc: R8: existing metrics fixtures updated in-scope
requirements.note: existing metrics e2e fixture flows in tests/e2e/metrics/token.test.js were updated to include state.finalizedAt.

unplanned.change: New shared test helper module (runner/config abstraction) added; this refactor is not explicitly required by R1-R8.
Test setup refactor to use shared helper utilities (beyond the fixture finalizedAt updates required by R8).
Additional cache read/parse error logging behavior was introduced; explicit logging behavior for cache read/parse failures is not specified in R1-R8.
Spec process documentation artifact added (not an implementation requirement).
Spec workflow state artifact added (not an implementation requirement).
Spec gate/issue log artifact added (not an implementation requirement).
Spec Q&A template artifact added (not an implementation requirement).
Spec review notes artifact added (not an implementation requirement).
Spec document artifact added (not an implementation requirement).
Spec-local test documentation artifact added (not an implementation requirement).

summary.notes: All listed requirements R1-R8 are implemented in the diff. Main extra changes are test code refactoring and spec-process/documentation artifacts outside the requirement set.
